title: Osaurus brings both local and cloud AI models to your Mac
summary: Osaurus combines local and cloud AI models in a single Mac application, allowing users to leverage both approaches while keeping their data private on their device. The app integrates users' memory, files, and tools while maintaining local hardware control, addressing growing privacy concerns around AI services.
content: Osaurus￼ combines local and cloud AI models in a Mac app that keeps users’ memory, files, and tools on their own hardware.

zh.title: Osaurus 为您的 Mac 带来本地和云 AI 模型
zh.summary: Osaurus 在单个 Mac 应用程序中结合了本地和云 AI 模型，允许用户同时利用两种方法，同时在设备上保持数据私密性。该应用程序集成了用户的记忆、文件和工具，同时保持本地硬件控制，解决了围绕 AI 服务日益增长的隐私问题。

title: Indian Uber rival Rapido raises $240M at $3B valuation
summary: Rapido, an Indian ride-hailing platform, has raised $240 million at a $3 billion valuation to fund expansion in the mobility sector. The company has grown by offering lower-cost alternatives to traditional ride-hailing through motorbikes, autorickshaws, and other flexible transport modes.
content: Rapido has driven its growth by enabling ride-hailing for lower-cost and more flexible modes of transport such as motorbikes and autorickshaws.

zh.title: 印度优步竞争对手 Rapido 以 30 亿美元估值融资 2.4 亿美元
zh.summary: 印度打车平台 Rapido 以 30 亿美元估值融资 2.4 亿美元，用于在出行领域的扩展。该公司通过摩托车、自动人力车和其他灵活的运输方式提供比传统打车更廉价的替代方案而不断增长。

title: The perfect commuter bike? Velotric's Discover 3 makes its case.
summary: Velotric's Discover 3 electric bike combines a customized mid-motor with Shimano's new Cues components to deliver performance and practical daily-use features. The bike targets the growing e-bike commuter market with a focus on versatility and reliability.
content: A customized mid-motor and Shimano's new Cues components are a winning combination.

zh.title: 完美的通勤自行车？Velotric 的 Discover 3 证明了这一点
zh.summary: Velotric 的 Discover 3 电动自行车结合了定制的中置电机和 Shimano 的新型 Cues 组件，以提供性能和实用的日常使用功能。该自行车针对不断增长的电动自行车通勤市场，重点关注多功能性和可靠性。

title: AI research papers are getting better, and it’s a big problem for scientists
summary: High-quality AI research papers are increasingly cited at unexpectedly high rates, with decades-old papers suddenly receiving citations daily, raising concerns about citation legitimacy. The trend highlights emerging challenges in maintaining research integrity as AI capabilities improve and potentially influence how scientific work is discovered and referenced.
content:
Last summer, Peter Degen's postdoctoral supervisor came to him with an unusual problem: One of his papers was being cited too much. Citations are the currency of academia, but there was something unusual about these. Published in 2017, the paper had assessed the accuracy of a particular type of statistical analysis on epidemiological data and had received a respectable few dozen citations in other research papers over the years, but now it was being referenced every few days, hundreds of times, placing it among the most cited papers of his career. Another professor might be thrilled. Degen's adviser asked him to investigate. 
Degen, a postd …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: AI研究论文质量在提高，但这对科学家来说是个大问题
zh.summary: 高质量AI研究论文的引用率出人意料地高，几十年前的论文如今每天都收到大量引用，这引发了人们对引用合法性的担忧。这一趋势凸显了随着AI能力的提升，以及AI可能影响科学工作如何被发现和引用的方式，维护研究完整性面临的新兴挑战。

title: Claude Code's product lead talks usage limits, transparency, and the "lean harness"
summary: Anthropic's Claude Code product lead Cat Wu discusses the platform's approach to usage limits, user transparency, and its design philosophy focused on incremental improvements rather than grand master plans. The interview reveals how the team balances developer accessibility with sustainable resource management.
content: "We have no grand plan," says Anthropic's Cat Wu—but that's by design.

zh.title: Claude Code产品负责人谈论使用限额、透明度和"精简架构"
zh.summary: Anthropic的Claude Code产品负责人Cat Wu讨论了该平台在使用限额、用户透明度方面的方法，以及其设计理念——专注于增量改进而非宏大蓝图。这次采访揭示了该团队如何平衡开发人员易用性与可持续的资源管理。
